summary: Completed testing of Beneficiary Succession Hierarchy feature. All 8 backend tests passed (7 passed, 1 skipped due to single beneficiary). Frontend UI verified via screenshot showing succession badges, drag handles, and explainer box. The reorder API correctly sets succession_order and is_primary fields.
passed_tests: GET /api/beneficiaries/{estate_id} returns list of beneficiaries sorted by sort_order
GET /api/beneficiaries/{estate_id}/succession returns beneficiaries sorted by succession_order
PUT /api/beneficiaries/reorder/{estate_id} sets succession_order and is_primary correctly
Reorder API sets position 0 as Primary (is_primary=true, succession_order=0)
Reorder API sets positions 1+ as Secondary/Tertiary etc (is_primary=false)
Reorder endpoint requires authentication (returns 401/403 without auth)
Succession endpoint requires authentication (returns 401/403 without auth)
Onboarding step label updated to 'Set Your Succession Order' (frontend + backend)
Beneficiaries response includes succession_order and is_primary fields
Frontend: Page subtitle shows 'Drag to set succession order'
Frontend: Succession explainer box visible with drag-to-reorder instructions
Frontend: Succession badges (PRIMARY, SECONDARY, etc.) displayed on cards
Frontend: Drag handles (GripVertical) visible on each beneficiary card
Frontend: Old 'Designate as Primary' and 'Change Primary Beneficiary' buttons removed
context_for_next_testing_agent: Succession hierarchy feature is fully implemented. The reorder API (PUT /api/beneficiaries/reorder/{estate_id}) sets succession_order and is_primary based on position. Position 0 = Primary, 1 = Secondary, etc. The frontend displays succession badges with labels from SUCCESSION_LABELS array. The promote_succession function in transition.py handles automatic promotion when a beneficiary dies (verified via TVT).

succession_hierarchy_ui.succession_badges: Display PRIMARY, SECONDARY, TERTIARY, etc. based on position
succession_hierarchy_ui.old_buttons_removed: No 'Designate as Primary' or 'Change Primary Beneficiary' buttons

reorder_api.behavior: Sets sort_order, succession_order, and is_primary for each beneficiary

succession_api.response: List of beneficiaries sorted by succession_order
